interfaces.name: Flight Booking Web Experience
interfaces.description: Primary direct shopping and booking experience for long-haul flights, premium cabins, and ancillaries.

interfaces.name: Mobile Booking Journey
interfaces.description: Responsive booking flow for travellers researching and booking on mobile devices.

interfaces.name: Retail Offer API
interfaces.description: Offer and order APIs supporting owned channels and controlled commercial integrations.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Builds governed fare and availability offers for direct and partner retail channels.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Offer service, pricing rules, cache refresh jobs, and inventory connectors
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Build, contract-test, and deploy the retail service through the airline commerce CI/CD pipeline.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Search, results, and offer-detail UI bundles
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Validate UX flows and deploy web assets via the frontend release pipeline.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Turns premium differentiation into monetizable seats, extras, and upgrade moments.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Ancillary pricing logic, seat-map services, and upgrade offer engines
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Build, test, and deploy ancillary services through the commerce pipeline.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Seat, bag, lounge, and upgrade user-interface modules
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run UI checks and deploy assets through the frontend pipeline.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Supports booking creation, changes, cancellations, and ticketing states after the initial purchase.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Order service, ticketing orchestration, refund jobs, and servicing adapters
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run end-to-end servicing tests and deploy the order service.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Connects traveller identity and travel-readiness context to retail and pre-travel journeys.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Identity APIs, profile services, and document-readiness workflows
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run security and contract checks, then deploy shared identity services.

interfaces.name: Guest Mobile App
interfaces.description: Native trip companion, loyalty, and disruption-recovery experience.

interfaces.name: Proactive Messaging Layer
interfaces.description: Push, email, and SMS notifications for trip-state changes and service prompts.

interfaces.name: Loyalty Account Workspace
interfaces.description: Member-facing web experience for points, status, redemptions, and trip-linked benefits.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Owns points, tiers, partner earning, and reward redemption logic.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Loyalty services, redemption rules, tier jobs, and partner-account connectors
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run contract, ledger, and regression tests before deployment.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Delivers the live state of the journey before, during, and after travel.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: iOS and Android app modules plus notification templates
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Build, test, and release native app features through mobile CI/CD.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Trip-state services, messaging orchestration, and event consumers
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run integration and event-driven tests before deployment.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Turns disruption into guided digital recovery for guests and agents.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Recovery engine, eligibility rules, and reaccommodation decision services
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run disruption scenario tests and deploy through the servicing pipeline.

interfaces.name: Holidays Search and Booking Experience
interfaces.description: Package discovery, comparison, and booking flow for leisure trips.

interfaces.name: Holiday Servicing Workspace
interfaces.description: Agent workspace for package amendments, payment queries, and exception handling.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Combines air inventory with accommodation and extras into coherent package products.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Package builder, supplier connectors, and fulfilment workflows
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run supplier and pricing tests, then deploy through the holidays pipeline.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Handles deposits, balance payments, refunds, and partner settlements for packages.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Payment services, refund workflows, and settlement jobs
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run finance controls and deploy through the payments pipeline.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Supports assisted package servicing and exceptions that cannot be resolved in self-service.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Agent workspace modules, queues, and workflow templates
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Validate workflow rules and deploy the case-management bundle.

interfaces.name: NDC and Agency API
interfaces.description: Modern distribution API for agencies, TMCs, and approved commercial partners.

interfaces.name: Commercial Account Workspace
interfaces.description: Commercial dashboard for account health, content controls, and channel performance.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Controls how negotiated offers and servicing content flow through indirect channels.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: NDC APIs, contract logic, and agency-serving policies
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run schema, contract, and policy validation before API promotion.
deliveryPaths.target: API gateway and cloud runtime account

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Coordinates commercial and servicing continuity across alliance, JV, and codeshare journeys.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Partner rules, messaging, and itinerary continuity services
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run partner integration and exception tests before deployment.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Provides account-level performance, leakage, and disruption insight to sales and commercial teams.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Account-health models, dashboards, and distribution reporting assets
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Validate KPI logic and publish through the analytics pipeline.

interfaces.name: Network Control Workspace
interfaces.description: Real-time operations view for flight risk, recovery actions, and priority decisions.

interfaces.name: Disruption Servicing Workspace
interfaces.description: Shared workspace for customer care and operational recovery teams handling disrupted guests.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Provides the integrated view of network health and intervention priorities.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Real-time dashboards, alerting tiles, and intervention workflows
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run real-time data and scenario tests before deployment.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Supports recovery tradeoffs across aircraft rotations, crew legality, and schedule repair.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Recovery decision services, optimization jobs, and schedule adapters
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run scenario-simulation tests and deploy through the operations pipeline.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Keeps airport execution and baggage recovery connected to flight and guest recovery decisions.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Airport and baggage state services plus station-facing workflows
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run operational acceptance tests and deploy the ground-journey bundle.
deliveryPaths.target: Operations workspace and cloud runtime account

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Routes high-priority disruption cases with operational context to service teams.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Case-management queues, service tools, and agent workflows
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run workflow validations and deploy through the care pipeline.

products.name: Cargo Digital Booking and Visibility Platform

interfaces.name: Cargo Digital Portal
interfaces.description: Digital cargo experience for quoting, booking, tracking, and shipment management.

interfaces.name: Cargo Connectivity API
interfaces.description: API support for customer-system and partner connectivity where cargo workflows warrant automation.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Creates the digital booking path and rate logic behind cargo demand capture.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Cargo quote engines, service-level logic, and booking workflows
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run cargo booking and rate tests before deployment.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Provides milestone visibility and proactive handling of shipment exceptions.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Tracking services, alerting workflows, and milestone event processors
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run event-driven tracking tests and deploy through the cargo pipeline.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Supports cargo billing adjustments and financial closure.

deliveryPaths.deploymentUnit: Cargo-rated billing and settlement jobs on the shared finance platform
deliveryPaths.pipeline: Run finance validations and deploy through shared finance CI/CD.
